AppConfiguration.title: AppConfiguration
AppConfiguration.description: Stores global configuration settings and static content for the Sai Paduka Portal, manageable via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AppConfiguration entity. This is typically a singleton entity with one record.

eventName.description: The official name of the event or portal (e.g., 'Sai Paduka').

organizerName.description: The name of the organization hosting the event (e.g., 'Sai Parivar Ambala').

locationDescription.description: A descriptive text for the event's physical location (e.g., 'Aggarwal Bhavan').

eventDate.description: The primary date of the event.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the event.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the event.

heroImageUrl.description: The URL for the background image on the homepage hero section.

instagramLink.description: Link to the event's or organization's Instagram profile.

facebookLink.description: Link to the event's or organization's Facebook page.

venueAddressGoogleMapEmbedLink.description: An embeddable URL for the venue's location on Google Maps, editable via the Admin Panel.

liveDarshanYoutubeLink.description: The URL for the live Darshan stream on YouTube, to be embedded on the website and editable via the Admin Panel.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to this configuration.

Volunteer.title: Volunteer
Volunteer.description: Represents a volunteer registration for the event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Volunteer registration.

externalAuthUserId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system (e.g., Google). (Relationship: ExternalAuthUser 1:N Volunteer)

name.description: The full name of the volunteer.

email.description: The email of the volunteer from auth.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the volunteer.

areaOfService.description: The specific area(s) where the volunteer wishes to serve (e.g., Crowd Management, Prasad Distribution, Cleanliness, Medical Help).

registrationDate.description: The timestamp when the volunteer registered.

DarshanRegistration.title: DarshanRegistration
DarshanRegistration.description: Represents a user's registration for Darshan with group details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Darshan registration.

externalAuthUserId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system.

userName.description: The name of the primary contact person.

userEmail.description: The email of the primary contact person.

userPhone.description: The contact phone number of the primary contact person.

totalPeople.description: The total number of people in the group.

devotees.description: List of all individuals (including the primary contact) attending.

registrationDate.description: The timestamp when the user registered for Darshan.

isCheckedIn.description: Whether the group as a whole has started check-in.

MailMessage.title: MailMessage
MailMessage.description: A document structure compatible with the 'Trigger Email' Firebase Extension.

Donor.title: Donor
Donor.description: Represents a prominent donor to be displayed on the Wall of Gratitude.

GalleryImage.title: GalleryImage
GalleryImage.description: An image for the public Photo Gallery.

definition.description: Stores a singleton document for global application configuration settings.
Collection monitored by the 'Trigger Email' Extension.
Public collection of prominent donors for the Wall of Gratitude.
Public collection of images for the photo gallery.
